mapper.select:
select * from category
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and type = #{type}
order by sort asc , create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into category(type, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) value (#{type},#{name},#{sort},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
